title: Craftable bundle
description: Makes bundle craftable in older versions of Minecraft
body:
**YOU DON'T NEED TO TURN ON BUNDLES IN EXPERIMENTAL SETTINGS!**

This mod finally makes bundles craftable in Minecraft 1.17 and higher without any extra steps. Stop messing with world settings and just start crafting!

**Main features:**

- No experimental toggles required

- Adds a balanced crafting recipe for bundles

- Simple and perfect for your survival world
